auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants (Nanaimo, BC - firm name not specified)
economic_notes: Nation owns hydro companies (Haa-ak-suuk Creek, Winchie Creek, Canoe Creek), Tin Wis Resort, TFN Seafoods, Tsawaak RV Resort, and construction management entity. Business entities accounted for by modified equity method with total investment of $4,207,265. Business entity long-term debt totals ~$53.9M.
notes: Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants' located in Nanaimo, BC. NTC funding ($8,582,300) passes through from ISC per Note 14 - treated as isc_funding. Total government transfers calculated as NTC + DFO + BC + FNHA + BC Gaming + CMHC = $10,905,552. OSR calculated as total revenue minus government transfers. Net financial assets is net debt position of -$5,797,114 per Statement of Changes in Net Debt. Business entities (hydro, resort, seafood, construction) have significant off-balance-sheet debt of ~$53.9M not consolidated. Natural Resources expenses of $1,391,768 mapped to infrastructure alongside Public Works. Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). No remuneration schedule found in provided text.
